case_title: ALAAP PANDIT VS. MRG VENTURES, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY PANDIT, ALAAP AS TO DEFENDANT MRG VENTURES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-27-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PANDIT, ALAAP AS TO DEFENDANT MRG VENTURES, INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 12/07/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-27-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PANDIT, ALAAP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MRG VENTURES, INC. $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,590.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: $1500 FOR REIMBURSEMENTS. PLAINTIFF INVESTED IN DEFENDANT AND THE $5500 HE INVESTED WAS NOT A LOAN REPAYABLE ON DEMAND ACCORDING TO THE EVIDENCE PLAINTIFF SUBMITTED. HE IS ENTITLED TO RECOVER $1500 TODAY AS REIMBURSEMENT FOR TRAVEL COSTS BUT HIS CLAIM TO RECOVER $5500 INVESTMENT IS NOT YET RIPE AND THE COURT DISMISSES THAT PORTION OF HIS CLAIM WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-12-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MRG VENTURES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-27-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-27-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN . APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ALAAP PANDIT. DEFENDANT MRG VENTURES, INC. DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
